name: Andrew Cunningham
longDesc: Andrew Cunningham commande la flotte britannique de Méditerranée, remporte Tarente en novembre 1940 et le cap Matapan en mars 1941. Carte WC4 navale tier-S or : meilleur amiral allié pour les scénarios de Méditerranée, à coupler avec des porte-avions.

skills.name: Navigation
skills.desc: When commanding a naval unit to attack, there is 100% chance that one of the surrounding inactive naval unit will participate in the attack.(Only once per turn)

skills.name: Leadership
skills.desc: When commanding a ship unit, you will not fall into Chaos. Attack of you and friendly troops of 1 grid around you +16.

skills.name: Fleet Leader
skills.desc: 32% chance to give the enemy a critical attack when commanding ship units

skills.name: Naval Assault
skills.desc: Damage +24% when commanding ship units. After attacking, restore maximum HP by 5% (Only once per turn)

skills.name: Early Warning
skills.desc: 60% chance to evade 20% damage when commanding ship units

sources: Données extraites des fichiers de jeu World Conqueror 4
longDescEn: Andrew Cunningham commanded the British Mediterranean Fleet, won Taranto in November 1940 and Cape Matapan in March 1941. A WC4 tier-S gold navy card — the best Allied admiral for Mediterranean scenarios, pair him with carriers.
longDescDe: Andrew Cunningham führte die britische Mittelmeerflotte und gewann im November 1940 bei Tarent und im März 1941 am Kap Matapan. Im WC4 eine S-Klasse-Gold-Marinekarte — der beste alliierte Admiral für Mittelmeer-Szenarien, ideal mit Trägern kombiniert.
